title: Whole Cake Island Comes Into View
description: On pages 14–16, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Judge, Reiju, Unknown person #15, Sanji as The rescue team reaches Big Mom’s territory and learns how Sanji is trapped by family and political pressure.
scene: The Sanji retrieval team enters Big Mom’s sphere of influence, where every friendly face may be connected to the wedding trap.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You lot a re the german, aren't ya?! You ain't even human!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've spent more than four hours here, dawdling...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're going to make me late for my little brother's wedding.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I couldn't give two shits about your family...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's done. I can't believe this sorry excuse for a war lasted for over two years.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: did we accept the help of the Devil Himself...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: No... it was God who helped us!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The war has finally come to an end! Thank you, Germa!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The ceremony will take place in three days.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We should be able to reach whole cake in two.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: I can't wait to see him.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: See you the day after tomorrow, then.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The tea party approaches! Those of the German gather!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Approach storyline with 34 dialogue beats. The crew moves from Zou toward Big Mom’s territory and begins to understand the scale of Sanji’s predicament.
